title: Software Update - "1" or "2" tag on the tab if any component is outdated
scenario: Software Update tab does not display numbered badge for available component updates on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Observe the badge on the Software Update tab
expected: The Software Update tab displays a numbered badge (e.g., "1" or "2") indicating how many components (headset, stand, charge case, etc.) have an available update.
